creator: contact@evilham.com
text:
Hello, was discussing some things related to this with debdrup yesterday, and I realised that something that'd help using sndio in FreeBSD would be one of those fantastic pkg-messages after installation.

Otherwise it looks to me like the only place where the rc script is documented is the rc-script itself.

Tested under poudriere without network access and installing on a machine without sndio.

Cheers,
